name: HTS_SCHED_SHIFT_REQUESTS
description: Table to store the schedule shift requests information.

columns.Name: SCHED_SHIFT_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Schedule shift request transaction identifier.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the schedule to which the shift belongs.

columns.Name: SHIFT_DATE
columns.Comments: Reference or actual date of the shift.

columns.Name: REQUEST_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of schedule shift request.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person ID who initiated the transaction.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Reference a schedule shift or a shift group in case of Consider Me opportunity requests.

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether object identifier represents shift identifier or group identifier using fixed values SHIFT or GROUP respectively.

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Reason code selected by user when submitting the request.

columns.Name: REASON_TEXT
columns.Comments: User entered reason text when reason code is selected as Other.

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the recipient shift identifier in case of swap request

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_SHIFT_VERSION
columns.Comments: Indicates the object version number on the recipient shift at the time of placing this request

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the assignment identifier on the recipient shift at the time of placing this request. For consider me flow, this is the requestor's assignment identifier.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the transaction.

columns.Name: PARTIAL_REQUEST_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the request is for a partial shift

columns.Name: PARTIAL_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Stores the requested start time for the partial shift.

columns.Name: PARTIAL_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Stores the requested end time for the partial shift.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the enterprise identifier to which this transaction belongs to.
